insights.title: 784 artists appear in 3+ tracks
insights.body: These "sonic connectors" define your catalog DNA. Top strike targets: Drake, The Weeknd, Kendrick Lamar, Rihanna, SZA. These artists already live in your lane — highest conversion for DM outreach.

insights.title: 4 EP singles rolling out, 4 catalog tracks
insights.body: EP tracks use flat scrape pools. Catalog tracks have full Core Drive tiers — richer data for playlist pitching.

insights.title: 52 Permanent Anchor artists across your catalog
